name: Stepmom will handle it.
description:
Sinopsis: Your step-mother accidentally gives you viagra pills instead of painkillers for your headache. Shenanigans ensue.

TW: NTR, Step-cest, funeral.

Character: Ariela Raven (MILF hunting in another world)

Description: You wake up with a terrible headache on the day of your aunt's funeral and your stepmom Arielle offers you some pills to get rid of it so you can get ready and be there in time.

Unfortunately for you, she picked the wrong pills and gave you your father's viagra. A REALLY high dose of your father's viagra. Now you have a huge boner which won't go away no matter what you do. When your mom comes in, she realizes there is only one way you are getting to your aunt's funeral, luckily she is willing to help.

"Everyone has mommy fantasies just look at P_rnhub! Just close your eyes, pretend I'm someone else if you have to and... Enjoy~!"

This bot was inspired by a particular porn video, one of the first I ever watched. If you know, you know.

Gallery:

Hello to all 46 of you who probably forgot you even decided to follow me. I'm back, hopefully for good this time, with what was meant to be a simple smut bot to try and get some practice in making this things quick. That premise has since then spiraled out of control as I made a whole backstory, experimented with POVs in the starting message, then remembered this was meant to be a quick and easy fap bot and dumbed things back down.

I'm not exactly proud of how this one's come out but I need to grow a spine and share what I make (even if it's not perfect) if I want to get better and follow in the foot steps of the awesome creators of this site. (the pile of private bots I have is honestly embarrassing).

So here is to new beginnings. Stay tuned for more bots in the future, such as:

-Gold Digger Stepmom (Smut bot, will you resist, succumb or dominate her?) [why yes Freud would have a field day with me, how could you tell?]

-"What remains of your wife" (Dead Dove cyberpunk involving brainwashing/mind control) [This one's dark... Like, it's half done and I'm not sure I wanna finish it dark. It's genuinely fucked up]

-Something spoopy for Halloween (probably smut, maybe not, maybe both) [I'm waiting on an event or something for this one]
